title: It's Only Natural
description: It's only natural to like this mod!
body:
Ever feel like the world could be just a little more pretty? Well, here's the mod for you!

It's Only Natural aims to make Minecraft look prettier, weither it be Stones & Pebbles that spawn about the world or new plants like Clovers and Cattails to help spruce up the various biomes.

This mod will be updated regularly with the same goal, make Minecraft a prettier place to be.

I hope you all will enjoy the mod, and feel free to give suggestions of what I should add!

This mod is free to use in any modpack, provided that you include proper credits.
